tool_input.prompt:
RUN_ID: subagent-2-run-2

This is a two-level nested sub-agent permission-surfacing spike. Spawn the spike-writer nested subagent. Instruct spike-writer to attempt the Bash permission probe (one permission-gated write-like operation). Report back the full nested result, including whether the permission was surfaced, allowed, or denied, and any error or prompt text.
